target_caption: Datsi’ tak wö̀a sarûrû, i kí̱ka íyi diö́köl wanyö’tso wè̱s: tkabë̀, sàl, ók, na̱mù̱ e̱na̱ tsawì.
Satë i ku̱a̱ki yö'tso ulù klö wa.I ki̱ idiö́köl târule è̱ë E̱na̱ mè̱ wa.

predicted_caption: Pë'pa dalì tso' ñõlõ̀ a̱. Pë'pa dalì ar. Pë'pa tso' ĩ́s ki̱. Ù tso' shkíshkî a̱.

target_caption: Ta̱î̱ pë’ dapàna̱ ká̱ kibí a̱ íyi ujtéchök. Ie’pa a̱ñì̱ wö̀ie i ká̱ ujtéchök.

predicted_caption: Wë́mpa tso' dur. Wë́m dalì tö wö́kir apàio tã'. Wë́mpa tö kàl tsók. Wë́mpa tso' ká̱ kibí a̱.

- Each man holds a stick.  
- The men are outdoors.

target_caption: Ie'pa bák se' shkë́ki ie, Wö́su̱k ie'pa e̱' chö tö irir ká̱ bulu' e̱na̱ ie'pa wö̀ki kò̱s íyi tso' e' wë́rke . Ká̱ i̱â̱i̱â̱ ie'pa bák sè̱nu̱k ká̱ i' ki̱.

predicted_caption: Ù tso' të̀ a̱. Ù wa̱ ù wö́kir kṍpa tso'. Kàl tso' ù a̱.

- A house is in the field.  
- The house has a thatched roof.  
- Trees are around the house.
back_translation: The house is in the field. The house has a tall roof. The trees are at the house.
target_caption: Ù sulë pámi̱k ta̱î̱ ká̱ wë́rke tsipátsipa, wö́su̱k ká̱ í̱te̱ idir.

predicted_caption: Wë́m dur. Ù tsikirîrî tso' shkíshkî a̱. Kàl tso' ù a̱. Ĩ́s wãkéwa.

target_caption: Ù wë́rke bë̂rie élwe. Êköl wë́m yë̂âr ù wö́su̱k. Ie’ kalö̀io dalôlô, pàio sarûrû.
